objective: Activate conservative quality-memory outcome priors while measuring unknown metadata, excluding unknowns from prior eligibility, and preserving apply authority boundaries.
implemented_behaviors: quality_memory_index emits candidate_event_count, unknown_event_count, and unknown_event_rate.
Unknown family metadata is measured but does not create an unknown family prior bucket.
Unknown panel or subregion metadata is measured but does not create unknown panel-pattern prior buckets or eligible attempts.
Unknown outcomes are measured only for attempt event types, so candidate_generated lifecycle events do not make the smoke gate impossible.
Prior eligibility requires known family, known panel/subregion, attempt event type, and improved/neutral/regressed outcome.
Recommended priors are scaled into the bounded [-0.25, 0.25] range after accounting for regressed outcomes.
Candidate ranking tests lock that memory priors change score evidence only and do not mutate effective apply authority.

tests.red_result_before_implementation: 3 failed, 12 passed; missing candidate_event_count/unknown_event_count and unknown metadata still activated priors

tests.red_result_after_initial_review: 2 failed, 24 passed; regressed outcomes did not lower prior and candidate_generated inflated unknown_event_rate
tests.green_result_after_review_fixes: included in final targeted suite: 39 passed

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_quality_memory_events.py tests/test_quality_memory_index.py tests/test_candidate_rank.py -q

uv run ruff check scripts/quality/quality_memory_events.py scripts/quality/quality_memory_index.py scripts/candidates/candidate_rank.py tests/test_quality_memory_events.py tests/test_quality_memory_index.py tests/test_candidate_rank.py
uv run python -m py_compile scripts/quality/quality_memory_events.py scripts/quality/quality_memory_index.py scripts/candidates/candidate_rank.py

initial_findings: Regressed outcomes could still clamp to the same positive prior as all-improved outcomes.
candidate_generated events inflated unknown_event_rate for normal lifecycle logs.
adversarial_verification.summary: Reviewer confirmed both findings resolved and reported no remaining Phase 5 blockers.

tooling_notes.summary: Previously unavailable in this environment: uv run basedpyright failed to spawn basedpyright.
An initial `uv run py_compile ...` command failed because py_compile is a module, not an executable; rerun as `uv run python -m py_compile ...` passed.
